mapper.insert:
SELECT ATTENDANCE_SEQ.nextval FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ATTENDANCE ( ATTENDANCE_ID, EMP_ID, WORK_DATE, CHECK_IN, CHECK_OUT, WORK_HOURS, STATUS, MEMO, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{attendanceId}, #{empId}, #{workDate}, #{checkIn,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{checkOut,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{workHours,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{status}, #{memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT ATTENDANCE_ID AS attendanceId, EMP_ID AS empId, WORK_DATE AS workDate, CHECK_IN AS checkIn, CHECK_OUT AS checkOut, WORK_HOURS AS workHours, STATUS AS status, MEMO AS memo FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND WORK_DATE = #{workDate}
SELECT a.*, e.EMP_NAME FROM ATTENDANCE a JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON a.EMP_ID = e.EMP_ID WHERE a.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND a.WORK_DATE = #{workDate}
SELECT a.*, e.EMP_NAME FROM ATTENDANCE a JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON a.EMP_ID = e.EMP_ID WHERE a.ATTENDANCE_ID = #{attendanceId}
